title: Hornet Removal in Eastchester, Westchester | $350 – $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Eastchester, Westchester. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350 – $550. Licensed experts serving Eastchester homes and businesses. Call now!
intro: Hornets can pose a serious threat to residents and businesses throughout Eastchester, from the tree-lined neighborhoods near Lake Isle to the bustling commercial areas along White Plains Road. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services to protect your property and family from these aggressive stinging insects. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests with proven methods tailored to Eastchester's unique residential and commercial properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Eastchester and the greater Westchester area with reliable, same-day hornet removal services for years. Our licensed and insured technicians use eco-friendly treatments that are safe for your family, pets, and the beautiful mature trees that make Eastchester neighborhoods so distinctive.
localContext: Eastchester's mix of historic homes, newer developments like Garth Woods, and properties near the Hutchinson River Parkway provides numerous locations where hornets can build nests in eaves, trees, and attics. The area's lush landscaping and proximity to wooded areas around California Road and the Leewood Golf Club creates ideal conditions for hornet activity, especially during late summer and early fall.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Eastchester?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Eastchester. Once you contact us, we typically arrive within 2-4 hours to assess and safely remove the nest, ensuring your property is protected as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest removal or treatment, elimination of all hornets, preventative measures to discourage future nests, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final price depends on nest size, location accessibility, and the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my Eastchester property?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family, pets, and landscaping. Our technicians are trained to handle hornet removal with minimal disruption to your property while ensuring complete elimination of the threat.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in Eastchester?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity in Eastchester typically peaks from late spring through early fall, with August and September being the most active months. Nests grow largest during this time, making hornets more aggressive and dangerous. It's best to address hornet problems as soon as you notice them.
